problem: How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage?
hypothesis: How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Sleep-dependent. Sleep-dependent memory consolidation in hippocampus directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
